name: serial-mcp
description: Headless MCP server for AI-assisted embedded-board serial log debugging, gated command writes, and board resets.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect serial logs and run approved board command/reset workflows through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Serial MCP lets Codex inspect ESP32, STM32, and other embedded-board text logs through a bundled FastMCP server. It also supports user-approved send_serial_command and reset_board workflows with audit markers. Installing or updating the plugin carries the pinned MCP server configuration without a separate top-level codex mcp registration step.
defaultPrompt: Use Serial MCP to inspect board logs, reset a board after approval, and run a clear, trigger, query debugging loop.
